raw_consumer_statement:
Around XX/XX/2024 we noticed our Costco Citi Visa credit card was being charged at various XXXXXXXX XXXX  around XXXX  and XXXX  for similar value charges ( ~ {$99.00} each time ). There were 14 charges going back to XX/XX/2024 for a total of around {$1400.00}. It appears that our credit card was skimmed at some point, since we were still in possession of the card. 

Citi investigated and responded with " Customer Responsible ''. We believe Citi 's fraud detection algorithms should have caught this in XXXX, since there were 3 charges on 3 consecutive days at 3 different XXXX 's for the same amount and that we should be reimbursed for the charges.
